pageContext.name: Grinch Checking His List
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Enesco are proud to present the Grinch Checking List His List Figurine!  Grinch has his list and is checking it twice to be sure all the good boys and girls of Whoville will have the best Christmas ever. This highly detailed hand-painted resin figurine includes faux fur trim to add an extra dimension to your holiday display.  Don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your Grinch collection today!
